description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a semicircular arrangement of deciduous trees, creating a sense of privacy and integration with nature. The building features a flat roof and a clean, boxy architectural form with large windows on the front facade, allowing for ample natural light. The exterior appears to be finished in a light, neutral color, likely stucco or painted concrete, with some wooden accents visible near the entrance. The front entrance is recessed and partially sheltered, suggesting a small porch area. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with larger panes facing the front and smaller ones on the sides. The overall setting evokes a contemporary suburban or park-side residence, blending minimalist design with landscaped surroundings.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large front windows and a light exterior, surrounded by a semicircle of trees. The design is minimalist and contemporary, with a small porch and asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a semicircular arrangement of trees.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the building, side windows, and the continuation of the tree arrangement.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back wall with minimal window openings and the trees encircling the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back and side of the bungalow, with the tree arrangement visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and smaller side windows
